title: athyrium × simlense
intro: Athyrium × simlense is a hybrid plant that belongs to the Athyrium genus, a group of ferns commonly known as lady ferns. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds and infections. The health benefits of Athyrium × simlense are said to include reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
